subcodes.title: Words to Mirza Fazlollah Khan, spoken on 1915-01-29
subcodes.first_line: All their theories and opinions have been useless and without result. They have made a trial of this, still they are not warned. They start in words and end in words. Their whole system of philosophy is based on speculations
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation
